rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relation to Elec. Code §84.001, which governs applications for early voting ballots by mail. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 84.001. APPLICATION REQUIRED. (a) To be entitled to vote an early voting ballot by mail, a person who is eligible for early voting must make an application for an early voting ballot to be voted by mail as provided by this title.
_note: Rule text concerns mail-in ballot application procedures; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
